TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_An-ka-la, title = An-ka-la, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/An-ka-la} }

S.FORM: == kakaliman == An-ka-la安卡拉 An-ka-la "Tu-al-ci a kamu Ankara, kitikit a ngiha ('aŋkaɾa) ", likisi singangan aca tu An-say-la "Ancyra", An-ke-la "Angora", nu Tu-al-ci pulung nu kanatal a tukay, tini i Syaw-ya-si-an-na-to-li-ya-kaw-yen teban nu saamisan, niyazu'ay a tademaw iza ku 450 a emang. haminnu An-ka-la a kuwan izaw ku 560 a emang ku tademaw, uyni i I-s-tan-paw nu sakatusa a tukay. 安卡拉(土耳其語:Ankara,國際音標:('aŋkaɾa) ),歷史上又稱安塞拉(Ancyra),安哥拉 , .
S.PHON: == kakar~ɾiman == an-ka-r~ɾa*** an-ka-r~ɾa "tu-ar~ɾ-ʦi a kamu ankara, kitikit a ŋiħa (ʔ~ʡaŋkaɾa) ", r~ɾikisi siŋaŋan aʦa tu an-saj-r~ɾa "anʦjra", an-kə-r~ɾa "aŋora", nu tu-ar~ɾ-ʦi pur~ɾuŋ nu kanatar~ɾ a tukaj, tini i sjaw-ja-si-an-na-to-r~ɾi-ja-kaw-jən təban nu saamisan, nijazuʔ~ʡaj a tadəmaw iza ku *** a əmaŋ. ħaminnu an-ka-r~ɾa a kuwan izaw ku *** a əmaŋ ku tadəmaw, ujni i i-s-tan-paw nu sakatusa a tukaj. ***(****:ankara,****:(ʔ~ʡaŋkaɾa) ),********(anʦjra),*** , .
S.FORM: == kakaliman == An-ka-la安卡拉 An-ka-la "Tu-al-ci a kamu Ankara, kitikit a ngiha ('aŋkaɾa) ", likisi singangan aca tu An-say-la "Ancyra", An-ke-la "Angora", nu Tu-al-ci pulung nu kanatal a tukay, tini i Syaw-ya-si-an-na-to-li-ya-kaw-yen teban nu saamisan, niyazu'ay a tademaw iza ku 450 a emang. haminnu An-ka-la a kuwan izaw ku 560 a emang ku tademaw, uyni i I-s-tan-paw nu sakatusa a tukay. 安卡拉(土耳其語:Ankara,國際音標:('aŋkaɾa) ),歷史上又稱安塞拉(Ancyra),安哥拉 , .
S.PHON: == kakar~ɾiman == an-ka-r~ɾa*** an-ka-r~ɾa "tu-ar~ɾ-ʦi a kamu ankara, kitikit a ŋiħa (ʔ~ʡaŋkaɾa) ", r~ɾikisi siŋaŋan aʦa tu an-saj-r~ɾa "anʦjra", an-kə-r~ɾa "aŋora", nu tu-ar~ɾ-ʦi pur~ɾuŋ nu kanatar~ɾ a tukaj, tini i sjaw-ja-si-an-na-to-r~ɾi-ja-kaw-jən təban nu saamisan, nijazuʔ~ʡaj a tadəmaw iza ku *** a əmaŋ. ħaminnu an-ka-r~ɾa a kuwan izaw ku *** a əmaŋ ku tadəmaw, ujni i i-s-tan-paw nu sakatusa a tukaj. ***(****:ankara,****:(ʔ~ʡaŋkaɾa) ),********(anʦjra),*** , .
